title: hypericum scabrum var. bourgaei
intro: Hypericum scabrum var. bourgaei, also known as Bourgae's St. John's Wort, is a plant species within the St. John's Wort genus, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum scabrum var. bourgaei include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antidepressant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, anxiety, and mild to moderate depression. Hypericum scabrum var. bourgaei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce symptoms of stress and anxiety.
